book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon XX.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: It shall not be lawful for a bishop to teach publicly in any city which does not belong to him.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: If any shall have been observed doing this, let him cease from his episcopate, but let him discharge the office of a presbyter.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: The bishop of one city shall not teach publicly in another.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: If he shall be shown to have dose so he shall be deprived of the episcopate and shall perform the functions of a presbyter.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: The meaning of this canon is most obscure.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Balsamon and Zonaras think that the Bishop is not to be deposed from his Episcopate, but only shorn of his right of executing the Episcopal functions, so that he will virtually be reduced to a presbyter.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Aristenus, on the other hand, considers the deposition to be real and that this canon creates an exception to Canon XXIX. of Chalcedon.
